an3.132:1.1: “Monks, there are these three types of individuals to be found existing in the world.
an3.132:1.3: An individual like an inscription in rock, an individual like an inscription in soil, and an individual like an inscription in water.
an3.132:1.4: And how is an individual like an inscription in rock?
an3.132:1.5: There is the case where a certain individual is often angered
an3.132:1.6: and his anger stays with him a long time.
an3.132:1.7: Just as an inscription in rock is not quickly effaced by wind or water and lasts a long time,
an3.132:1.8: in the same way a certain individual is often angered,
an3.132:1.9: and his anger stays with him a long time.
an3.132:1.10: This is called an individual like an inscription in rock.
an3.132:2.1: And how is an individual like an inscription in soil?
an3.132:2.2: There is the case where a certain individual is often angered,
an3.132:2.3: but his anger doesn’t stay with him a long time.
an3.132:2.4: Just as an inscription in soil is quickly effaced by wind or water and doesn’t last a long time,
an3.132:2.5: in the same way a certain individual is often angered,
an3.132:2.6: but his anger doesn’t stay with him a long time.
an3.132:2.7: This is called an individual like an inscription in soil.
an3.132:3.1: And how is an individual like an inscription in water?
an3.132:3.2: There is the case where a certain individual—when spoken to roughly, spoken to harshly, spoken to in an unpleasing way—is nevertheless congenial, companionable, & courteous.
an3.132:3.3: Just as an inscription in water immediately disappears and doesn’t last a long time,
an3.132:3.4: in the same way a certain individual—when spoken to roughly, spoken to harshly, spoken to in an unpleasing way—is nevertheless congenial, companionable, & courteous.
an3.132:3.5: This is called an individual like an inscription in water.
an3.132:3.6: These are the three types of individuals to be found existing in the world.”
